source: Artificial intelligence is becoming very important in education because it helps students write faster and organize their ideas. However, AI-generated text can sometimes sound repetitive, generic, and unnatural. Therefore, students should use AI tools carefully and revise the output.
target: Artificial intelligence is becoming a useful support tool in education, especially when students need help organizing ideas or preparing early drafts. Still, AI-written text often needs careful revision because it can sound repetitive or too general. Students should therefore treat AI output as a starting point, then reshape it in their own words and check that the final version reflects their understanding.

source: Online learning has become a common method of education because it gives students more flexibility and allows them to access lessons from different locations. However, online learning can also create some problems because students may feel isolated, distracted, or less motivated to participate.
target: Online learning has made education more flexible by allowing students to attend lessons from different places and manage their study time more independently. However, this flexibility does not always lead to better learning. Some students may feel isolated, lose motivation, or become distracted when regular classroom interaction is missing.

source: Social media has become a major part of daily life because it allows people to communicate quickly and share information. However, excessive use of social media can affect students negatively because it may reduce concentration and waste time.
target: Social media is now part of everyday student life, offering quick communication and constant access to shared information. Used carefully, it can be helpful. The problem appears when online activity begins to compete with study time, concentration, and academic responsibilities.

source: Technology has changed the way students learn because it gives them access to online resources, digital books, and educational videos. However, depending too much on technology can reduce critical thinking because students may copy information without fully understanding it.
target: Digital tools have changed how students study by giving them access to online resources, electronic books, and educational videos. At the same time, technology should not replace independent thinking. When students copy information too quickly, they may finish an assignment without fully understanding the topic.

source: Renewable energy is becoming more important because many countries are trying to reduce pollution and depend less on fossil fuels. Solar and wind energy can provide cleaner sources of power, but they also require strong infrastructure and careful planning.
target: Renewable energy has become an important part of environmental planning as countries look for cleaner alternatives to fossil fuels. Solar and wind power can reduce pollution, but the transition requires reliable infrastructure, careful planning, and long-term investment.

source: Artificial intelligence is very important because it helps students write faster but the text can sound robotic.
target: Artificial intelligence can help students prepare drafts more quickly, but the final writing still needs human revision. Without careful editing, the text may sound mechanical and may not fully show the student's own understanding.

source: Many people use the internet every day because it gives fast access to information. However, not all information online is accurate, so users should check sources before trusting what they read.
target: The internet gives people quick access to a wide range of information, but speed does not always mean accuracy. Users need to evaluate sources carefully before accepting online content as reliable.

source: Students should read books because reading improves vocabulary and helps them understand new ideas. However, many students do not read enough because they spend more time on phones.
target: Reading can strengthen students' vocabulary and expose them to new ideas, yet many students give less time to books than to their phones. Encouraging regular reading may help learners develop stronger language skills and deeper understanding.

source: Climate change is a serious problem because it affects weather, agriculture, and human life. Governments should take action to reduce pollution and protect the environment.
target: Climate change is a major global concern because it influences weather patterns, food production, and daily life. Governments can respond by reducing pollution, supporting cleaner energy, and protecting natural resources.

source: University students face stress because they have many assignments, exams, and responsibilities. This stress can affect their health and academic performance.
target: University life can place students under significant pressure, especially when assignments, exams, and personal responsibilities happen at the same time. If this pressure is not managed well, it can affect both well-being and academic performance.

source: Mobile phones are useful because they help students communicate and search for information. However, using phones too much can distract students from studying.
target: Mobile phones can support students by making communication and information search easier. Still, frequent phone use can interrupt study time and make it harder for students to concentrate on academic tasks.

source: Good communication is important in the workplace because it helps employees share ideas and solve problems. Poor communication can cause misunderstanding and reduce productivity.
target: Effective communication plays an important role in the workplace because it allows employees to exchange ideas, coordinate tasks, and solve problems more easily. When communication is weak, misunderstandings increase and productivity can decline.

source: Healthy food is important because it gives the body energy and protects people from disease. Many people eat fast food because it is cheap and easy to get.
target: A healthy diet provides energy and supports long-term physical well-being. However, many people rely on fast food because it is affordable and convenient, even though it may not provide the nutrition their bodies need.

source: Learning English is useful because it helps people communicate with others and find better jobs. Students should practice English every day to improve their skills.
target: English can be valuable for communication, education, and employment opportunities. To improve, students need regular practice through reading, speaking, listening, and writing rather than depending only on classroom lessons.

source: Public transportation is good because it reduces traffic and pollution. However, some people do not use it because it is not always comfortable or available.
target: Public transportation can reduce traffic congestion and lower pollution by decreasing the number of private cars on the road. Its impact is limited, however, when services are uncomfortable, unreliable, or unavailable in certain areas.

source: Exercise is important for students because it improves health and reduces stress. Many students do not exercise because they are busy with school work.
target: Regular exercise can help students maintain their health, manage stress, and stay more focused. Even with a busy academic schedule, short and consistent physical activity can support both mental and physical well-being.

source: Libraries are useful because they provide books and quiet places for study. Some students do not use libraries because they prefer online sources.
target: Libraries continue to support learning by offering books, research materials, and quiet spaces for study. Although many students now prefer online sources, libraries can still provide reliable information and a focused academic environment.

source: Group work helps students learn because they share ideas and solve problems together. However, sometimes one student does all the work and others do not participate.
target: Group work can improve learning when students exchange ideas, divide tasks fairly, and solve problems together. The benefit becomes weaker when participation is unequal and only one student carries most of the responsibility.

source: Time management is important because students have many tasks to finish. If students do not manage time well, they may feel stressed and miss deadlines.
target: Time management is an essential skill for students because academic life often includes several tasks at once. Without a clear plan, students may become stressed, rush their work, or fail to meet important deadlines.

source: Cybersecurity is important because people use the internet for banking, shopping, and communication. Weak security can lead to stolen information and financial loss.
target: Cybersecurity has become increasingly important as people use the internet for banking, shopping, communication, and data storage. Weak security practices can expose personal information, create financial risks, and reduce trust in digital services.

source: IT security is becoming very important because businesses depend on digital processes. Many companies are worried about malware and hacking, so new methods are needed to protect data and services.
target: IT security has become more important as organizations depend on digital systems for daily operations. Malware, hacking, and infrastructure attacks remain major concerns, which means companies need stronger methods to protect data integrity and maintain service continuity.

source: Information systems security protects data and services from attacks. As organizations use more digital tools, security teams develop new methods to prevent hacking, malware, and service disruption.
target: Information systems security focuses on protecting organizational data, digital services, and technical infrastructure. As digital dependence increases, security teams must respond to threats such as malware, hacking, and service disruption with more adaptive protection methods.

source: Artificial intelligence can help cybersecurity because it can process large amounts of data. In the age of big data, AI can analyze patterns and detect possible threats faster than traditional methods.
target: Artificial intelligence can support cybersecurity by analyzing large volumes of data and identifying patterns that may indicate potential threats. In a big data environment, this ability can help security systems respond more quickly and improve the protection of digital infrastructure.

source: Businesses are spending more money on security because cyber threats are increasing. Reports show that the global security market is growing as companies try to protect their systems and data.
target: Organizations are investing more heavily in security as cyber threats become more frequent and complex. Market reports suggest continued growth in security spending because companies need stronger protection for their systems, data, and digital operations.

source: Malware and hacking are serious hazards for companies because they can damage systems and steal information. These threats make organizations search for better security solutions.
target: Malware and hacking remain serious risks for organizations because they can disrupt systems, expose sensitive information, and weaken trust in digital services. As a result, companies continue to seek stronger security strategies and more reliable protection tools.

source: Although it has always been a crucial field, as businesses increasingly rely on digital processes, IT security is becoming even more crucial. The industry is expanding well, and Gartner anticipates that global security sales will rise by about 11.3 percent to US$188.3 billion in 2023[1]. The degree of worry expressed about certain hazards reflects both the attitude of the past and the requirement for fresh action in the present. Nearly half of all businesses still consider malware and hacking to be severe hazards, making them the top threats prompting worry. As attacks on organizations' infrastructures rise, new methods to safeguard data integrity and service continuity are continually being developed and put into use in the field of information systems security. Artificial intelligence has emerged in many facets of our daily lives and our economy. In the era of BIG DATA's exponential expansion, it can process and analyze massive amounts of data.
target: IT security has long been an important field, but its role has become even more significant as businesses depend more heavily on digital processes. The sector continues to grow, and Gartner estimated that global security spending would increase by about 11.3 percent to reach US$188.3 billion in 2023[1]. Current concerns about cyber risks show both the persistence of older threats and the need for new responses. Malware and hacking remain major issues for many organizations, especially as attacks on digital infrastructure become more frequent. In response, information systems security continues to develop methods for protecting data integrity and maintaining service continuity. Artificial intelligence is also becoming relevant in this area because it can process and analyze large volumes of data, particularly in environments shaped by the rapid growth of big data.
